name: Ellie Brooks
behaviour: Selective socialiser who invests deeply in a small circle rather than networking widely.
communication_style: warm in writing, slightly more cautious in person until comfortable
relationship_goals: a partner who respects her need for quiet and has their own inner life
background: Small patisserie in Bath. Opens at 7am, closes at 2pm. Afternoons are books, walks, and long cooking experiments nobody asked for.
